headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: terminated  for  cause  or  for  convenience,  Subcontractor  agrees  to  assign  to  Contractor  or  others  designated  by Contractor,  upon  Contractor's  written  request,  Subcontractor's  rights  under  any  purchase  order  or  subcontract related to the Subcontract Work.
